installCommand: cd ../.. && pnpm install && pnpm --filter @localservices/shared build && pnpm --filter @localservices/database build

headers.value: X-CSRF-Token, X-Requested-With, Accept, Accept-Version, Content-Length, Content-MD5, Content-Type, Date, X-Api-Version, Authorization

default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://www.google.com https://www.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://unpkg.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://res.cloudinary.com https://*.googleusercontent.com https://tile.openstreetmap.org https://images.unsplash.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.firebaseio.com https://*.googleapis.com wss://*.firebaseio.com https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org; frame-src https://www.google.com https://*.firebaseapp.com; font-src 'self' data:;
